title: dinebra lima
intro: Dinebra lima, also known as Fingered Citron or Buddha's Hand, is a type of citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Dinebra lima is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Dinebra lima include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help with weight management due to its high water content and potential appetite-suppressing properties. Dinebra lima can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, juice, or essential oil, which can be used to address a range of health concerns, from digestive issues to skin problems.
